title: Exchange of letters between Chair of the Regulatory Innovation Office and the Chief Executive of the Civil Aviation Authority: 21 and 22 October 2025
body: "Exchange of letters between Lord Willetts, Chair of the Regulatory Innovation Office (RIO) with the Chief Executive of the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA). The letters set out priority actions the CAA will take to help drive growth and innovation in the UK space sector.   These actions are within the work programme that the Department for Transport (DfT) has agreed to grant to the CAA for 2025 to 2026.  "
